sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113554" key="xeimo/sporos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειμό-σπορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113554.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sown in winter,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:4:11:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.11.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
